series_metadata.series_description: These records relate to consumer complaints against savings banks regulated by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions ("DFI") under Chapters 1161., 1163. and 1165. of the Ohio Revised Code. In addition, these records include correspondence relating to the consumer complaint.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years after date consumer complaint matter is closed, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
